label: 1527 CE
era_summary: Year 1527 (MDXXVII) was a common year starting on Tuesday of the Julian calendar.

rome_italy.summary: Active conflicts in 1527: Pope, Venice, Florence-emperor, Spain 1526-28; France, Venice, England, Genoa (till June 1528)-emperor, Spain, Genoa, 1526-30. No Maddison GDP coverage for this region — economy held at neutral 50, reflecting the thin pre-modern record outside the European core. Governance held at neutral (V-Dem coverage starts 1789).
